hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=(i.prompt||'').trim();if(/^\/fast\b/.test(p)){console.error('[nexus] BLOCKED: /fast mode is disabled for this project. Nexus sessions run with FIXED max effort (Opus 4.6 1M, extended thinking always on). See .claude/settings.json and CLAUDE.md for rationale.');process.exit(2)}}catch(e){}process.exit(0)})"
